variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 5246 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 5246 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 5246 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 2716/1 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5246
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 2716/1 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5246
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 270.0 mm, Dimension B: 112.0 mm, Dimension H: 36.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4442 Engine Air Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5246
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4442 Engine Air Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5246
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4442 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
